title: Wonder Man
description: The cult classic 1980s superhero movie that became a film phenomenon decades later. Wonder Man, with his sidekick Barnaby, uses his powerful ionic energy to protect the planet from evil.
quote: Until Barnaby pulled me out, no one else ever gave a damn. It’s too late for me, but you can still walk away.
altHero: Brent Willard as Wonder Man fighting an alien in the desert
alt2: Wonder Man kicking an alien in the face
alt4: Wonder Man aiming an electric bolt at an alien up on a cliff
